event: Woman and Child in a Basement Interior
description: A Dutch interior scene set in a basement or cellar room with stone walls, heavy wooden ceiling beams, and a large arched opening at left. A woman in a white cap and dark clothing sits at left near a large bundle or piece of furniture, leaning forward. A small child stands beside her, looking up. Through the arch, a tiled fireplace surround in warm colors is visible in an alcove. To the right, a doorway opens into a brighter room with a window, through which daylight streams in, illuminating a bed or piece of furniture covered in blue fabric.
